title: Tutorials for R for Data Science and US Census Data
text: recommended way launch tutorials R Tutorials extension VS Code, lists every installed tutorial lets start one click. backup, can launch tutorial R console learnr::run_tutorial(), providing short name tutorial package name.

title: Tutorials for R for Data Science and US Census Data
text: tutorials cover material R Data Science (2e) (R4DS) Hadley Wickham, Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel, Garrett Grolemund. five related tutorials package: r4ds-1, r4ds-2, r4ds-3, r4ds-4, r4ds-5. Different tutorials cover different chapters book follows.

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: misc.tutorials package provides interactive tutorials two main categories: R Data Science fundamentals US Census data analysis. R Data Science tutorials based R Data Science (2e) Hadley Wickham, Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel, Garrett Grolemund. Census tutorial draws Analyzing US Census Data: Methods, Maps, Models R Kyle Walker.

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: collection interactive tutorials covering R Data Science essentials US Census data analysis. package makes extensive use tools tutorial.helpers package.

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: package includes five r4ds tutorials (r4ds-1 r4ds-5). organization differs book: tutorial begins sourcing data different sort storage technology working data. r4ds-1: Data import, visualization, transformation, tidying (delimited files) r4ds-2: Spreadsheets, layers, exploratory data analysis, communication r4ds-3: Databases, logical vectors, numbers, strings, regular expressions r4ds-4: Arrow, factors, dates times, missing values, joins r4ds-5: Hierarchical data, web scraping, functions, iteration

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: census tutorial covers working US Census data using tidycensus package, walking case studies income, educational attainment, median age, including choropleth maps drawn ggplot2.

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: run tutorial, use: learnr::run_tutorial(name = "short_tutorial_name", package = "misc.tutorials") Available tutorial names : r4ds-1, r4ds-2, r4ds-3, r4ds-4, r4ds-5, census.
